feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content: I just wanted to understand in S4HANA Cloud public edition , if I need to debug the logic written inside BADI within CUSTOM LOGIC app. How could I perform ? Also i don't have ADT luxury.

entry.title: Quantity Scales determination in the multi payee condition contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In case of Multi Payee Condition Contract (0S02), the requirement is to determine the scale for settlement condition type is based on the Total Business quantity for all the customers maintained in the Business volume criteria in the condition contract, however the settlement calculation will be done on the basis of individual customer business volume quantity.

In this case, only the scales need to be determined based on the total business volume quantity. It works for the total business volume (Amount) when we assign Routine 2 to RES1 condition type and RBVT condition type to the business volume criteria. However, it does not work in cases where the scales need to be determined based on the total quantity.

Please suggest.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Multiple Profit center issue in Delta accrual document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When we are performing Delta accruals against the condition contract for multiple profit centers, the Delta accruals document is not being posted to the accounts. An error message "GLT2201 - Balancing field Profit Center in line item not filled" is displayed. The settlement document is created correctly for the multiple profit centers and the invoices are also posted correctly for different profit centers. However, when we execute the Delta accruals document, the system is unable to post the document for the multiple profit centers. The Delta accruals work fine in the case of a single profit center.

Please advise.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Documents to be uploaded through GOS - Store business document option
entry.content:
We have to upload the documents in various transactions through GOS - Store business document option which will get stored on DMS server.
And for the same we need your guidance on below mentioned points-
1. How to set DMS attachment size limit to for 5 MB; so that file size above 5MB should not get uploaded and system will show an error
2. File size should get compress while uploading through GO


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I add a new communication scenario to my SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi experts, I'm trying to add a new communication scenario to the 'Communication Arrangement' app in my SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Specifically, I'm trying to use the module SAP_COM_0120 related to the billing document, but it does not appear on the 'Create' page. Could you guide me on how to add this module typically? I've reviewed some documents and might need to adjust them from SAP Netweaver. Could you confirm if this is the correct procedure? Your assistance in this matter is highly valued and appreciated.

 

Here's the capture on my list.

I would like to know if it is related to Odata V2 (SOAP API) so I can't add it or if I don't have the privileges to establish this module with Communication Arrangement.

 

Attached is the API file description I need.

Overview | Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: Can these two standard apps be extended-F0458 Access Approver and F0220 Request Access
entry.content: Can these two standard apps be extended-F0458 Access Approver and F0220 Request Access

entry.title: Partial goods issue for the work order through Basic EWM functionality
entry.content:
Partial goods issue for the work order through Basic EWM functionality

We are having the Delivery based production integration in my current project. The client is having the basic EWM functionality. When the process order is requesting the raw materials for the staging area, in EWM we will get the Outbound Delivery. 

As off now, I can be able to issue full OBD quantities to the staging area. But the client ask is to issue the partial quantities with one OBD.

How we can be able to achieve this?

 

Regards

entry.title: When SCCLN , it report Errors occurred during export of container object FINB-TR-DERIVATION
entry.content:
Dear SAP
The client do not be copyed for test in the SAP project.
When SCCLN from client 500 to 530, it report Errors occurred during export of container object FINB-TR-DERIVATION .
But When SCCLN from 510 to 530, it is OK.
About the releation between client 500 ,510 and 530,Pls refer the attachment.
Pls help to solve it.

entry.title: Split Production Order Issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

Can someone help me with an issue I'm having with the split production order functionality in SAP?

I'm trying to split a production order, but the actual costs of previous operations are not being transferred to the child order; only the costs related to goods issue are being transferred. I've already checked the "Split Actual Costs" checkbox in transaction OPL8 and performed operation confirmation for the previous operations. However, the costs still aren't transferring as expected.

All cost configurations are properly maintained for operations (Work Centers). Is there something I'm missing or an additional configuration that needs to be checked? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Data Migration Cockpit Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few custom fields for a customer's (Key User Extensibility Fields). We are in the stage of migrating their legacy system data into SAP.

There is a data migration template called (Source data for Customer - extend existing record by new org levels) where it has the custom fields I have created in the system. But whatever the value I put in the template and migration is also getting successful, but somehow couldn't see the value getting reflected on the customer master data records.

Please advise what could be wrong in here.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Please refer to the below screenshot

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Column net price is empty
entry.content:
Dear expert:

         By t-code me31k, Create two service contracts document whose material group in contact item are same. the material group is 007 ( services ).  the different is services master data of service line in document，one service number of contract document is 100225, the other service number of document is 100227.  then, By t-code me51n, Create purchase requisition document with material group 007 ( services ) and service number 100225. Double click "assign source of supply" in source of supply tab, the system show source of list, but I find that the column net price in some document is empty. for example document 4600000106， the net price in some document is not empty. for example document 4600000107.

       Why the column net price in this two document show different behaviors. Is this standard behavior? I think this is problem, could you please check this problem in internet sap system. screen shots is as below.

Thank you

entry.title: In S/4 Hana Numbering Scheme content for commodity codes not available in Fiori App.
entry.content:
Hi,

In S/4 Hana, Numbering Scheme and Numbering Scheme content for Commodity Codes are maintained in S4 Hana. But in Fiori App Numbering Schema is not displayed.  Without this i can't able to maintain commodity code in Fiori App. Is there any additional configuration is required?  Is there any other way to maintain Commodity code?

entry.title: Enhancement our user exsit in outbound delivery save
entry.content: Enhancement our user exist to  in outbound delivery save for integration with CRM

entry.title: Issue with the intercompany PO (ICPO) pricing in our Adv IC solution implemented for Hershey
entry.content:
When a Customer SO is saved, VCM (Value Chain Monitor) creates the intercompany PO (ICPO).The pricing procedure in this ICPO includes the P101 condition type, which pulls the standard price from the material master.There are instances where the month of the SO/ICPO and delivery date differ, leading to a situation where the standard price of the material is updated through the costing process.Consequently, billing picks up the new price, but the ICPO retains the previous month's price.The VCM-initiated ICPO is not modifiable.

Issue with MEI1:SAP suggested using MEI1 as a potential solution for repricing the ICPO.However, this is not feasible because PERSON_NAME's uses a pricing procedure with the P101 condition type, which is internal and does not have an access sequence. Confirmed by the SAP Product team under separate OSS message.As a result, MEI1 cannot be used to update the price in the ICPO.

Request: Please advise on other possible options to achieve repricing for the intercompany PO, given the constraints with the P101 condition type and the non-modifiable nature of the VCM-initiated ICPO.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Structured Material with decentralized EWM
entry.content:
We have decentralized EWM and have some structured materials (in our case: Displays). It's not possible to do the explosion manually in S/4 (error L9526) or during Goods Receipt (error VL583). After some research I come to the conclusion that a "normal" explosion is simply not supported.

My question is: what would be the advised work-around?

I've tried some options in both S/4 and EWM and it seems to me that the only option would be to manually issue the Display and receive its components with, for instance, movement types 502 and 501. Does anyone have a better suggestion?

entry.title: ME2ON cannot be used with Account Assignment "M" in Subcontracting PO
entry.content:
Hi all,

Would like to check how could we resolve the followings?

When the subcontracting orders are account-assigned to a sales order, the components are not transferred (using a transfer posting) to the "stock of material provided to vendor" but are directly withdrawn from the sales order stock the time of the goods receipt. The material manufactured is also posted to the sales order stock. In such circumstances, a Subcontracting PO with Account Assignment Category "M" will not appear in ME2ON because no need to transfer stock to Subcontractor.

How could user generate the mandatory forms? E.g. Delivery output form that is needed for the shipment to happen? We need to trigger all these forms from delivery order. The user will not be able to do so since now Delivery Order is skipped due to there is no more usage of ME2ON. Or is there any possibility to generate the outbound Delivery Order for subcontract PO besides ME2ON? Thanks!

entry.title: Croatia e-Invoicing to Moj eRacun
entry.content:
How to connect to Moj e-Racun using S4HANA Cloud Document and Reporting Compliance?

entry.title: Requirement 77 (CCS: Accr from Settl) assigned to the Condition type REA5
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In the Standard Pricing procedure for Settlement A10005 (Rebates - Germany), Requirement 77 (CCS: Accr from Settl) is assigned to the REA5 condition type. However, in the pricing procedure A17005 (Rebates US), it is not assigned to the condition type REA5. Therefore, I would like to understand the functionality or purpose of the routine 77 assigned to REA5. If it's not assigned, what are the implications?

Please advise.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: 3PL warehouse Integration with SAP
entry.content:
I am using Basic Type: SHP_OBDLV_SPLIT_DECENTRAL02 AND MESSAGE TYPE :SHP_OBDLV_SPLIT_DECENTRAL from 3PL warehouse to split the delivery in SAP S4 HANA. But the idoc is failing with Status 51 error  .

Error Detail: 

Error in document 0080000698 item 000010 (quantity consistency check).

I have filled the idoc segment:

Please help here what else need to be updated in the idoc segment.

Thanks,

Arjun

entry.title: fiori configuration with logon group
entry.content:
Bearing in mind that our S/4HANA system has Fiori in the same instance, can you tell us how we should proceed to manage limiting executions to a logon group?
